'''Durgeon''' was an astronomical object located in the [[Durgeon system/Legends|Durgeon system]], a part of the [[Galov sector/Legends|Galov sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Region" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beylyssa]] single-handedly destroyed a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell on Durgeon after hunting the fledgling group for [[Standard month/Legends|months]].<ref name="ED" />
